goal: 实现 Agent Run UI 运行态交互模型

summary.title: 实现 Agent Run UI 运行态分层
summary.what: 新增 Agent Run Activity 投影视图和 Side Panel status/timeline 组件，将工具生命周期、错误、压缩和人工介入从 chat transcript 分离；runtime chat 事件补充 phase 与稳定 toolCallId；完成 ISSUE-188 收口并重建 live queue。
summary.why: ISSUE-188 要求 Chat transcript 只承载语义对话，运行态、工具调用、压缩、错误、人工介入和诊断进入独立 Run Activity 视图模型与 UI。
summary.user_goal: 实现 Agent Run UI 运行态交互模型

decisions.chose: 在 sidepanel state 中新增 RunActivityProjection，并由 RunStatusStrip 与 RunActivityTimeline 消费。
decisions.rationale: 这样 transcript、current run status 和 activity timeline 分层，避免把工具和状态伪装成普通 assistant message。
rejected: 继续把 tool.call/tool.result 作为 ChatTranscriptPane 的普通 tool item 渲染

decisions.chose: runtime chat event 为 tool.call/tool.result 输出同一 runtime-generated toolCallId，并在 reducer 中以 activity:tool:<id> upsert。
decisions.rationale: 当前 kernel 回调没有把 LLM 原始 tool_call id 暴露给 mv3 runtime；在 write_scope 内用 runtime 稳定 id 可保证 live stream 配对，同时 bootstrap persisted tool messages 复用同一投影规则。
rejected: 修改 packages/kernel 的 runLoop callback 签名

decisions.chose: 保留 assistant rich text、inline tool result、system/compaction summary、copy/edit/retry/fork 逻辑，只把 standalone tool trace 改投影到 activity timeline。
decisions.rationale: ISSUE-188 要求改善信息层级，不回退已经落地的 transcript 交互。

review_notes: 验证通过：focused vitest 3 files / 96 tests；Biome check 通过；bun run typecheck 通过。
live queue 已通过 bun run workflow:queue:build 重建，entryCount=0。
未改 packages/kernel callback 签名，避免越出 ISSUE-188 write_scope。

architectural_claims: Side Panel chat transcript and agent runtime activity are separate view models.
Run Activity is the product-facing projection for live phase, timeline entries, tool lifecycle, compaction, intervention and errors.
behavioral_changes: Standalone tool.call/tool.result events no longer create transcript tool items; they update runActivity timeline items.
Side Panel renders current run status strip and activity timeline above the transcript.
Successful activity entries are collapsed by default while running, failed, blocked and intervention entries remain visible.
runtime chat events now carry phase information and paired toolCallId values for tool lifecycle rendering.

api_changes.signature: bbl-next.runtime.chat.event run.state / assistant.delta / assistant.done / tool.call / tool.result payloads

data_model_changes.name: RunActivityProjection / RunActivityItem / RunStatusView
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Derived UI state; no persisted migration required.

security_implications: Thinking is represented as phase/progress labels only; raw chain-of-thought is not surfaced.
migration_notes: Bootstrap tool messages are projected into runActivity using the same reducer helpers as live events.
No persisted storage migration is required.
